name: techlifted
description: TechLiftED — online engineering & tech education platform for students in India

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c cyan,magenta "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix frontend run build
